ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the city where the property is located */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of the property (e.g., apartment, house, commercial) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the property */,
  "n_floors" INTEGER /* Number of floors in the property */,
  "n_bathroom" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "surface_m2" INTEGER /* Surface area of the property in square meters */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the property */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the property listing */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the property listing (e.g., API, CSV, manual) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the property (e.g., available, sold, off-market) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of the city */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate type of the city */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the city data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging in */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the property */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the property */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views */,
  "last_viewed" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last view */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_views_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
